content: {"business_logic": "Define el esquema de datos local para productos, transacciones, reglas de matching y logs de auditor\u00eda, permitiendo funcionamiento offline.", "dependencies": ["dexie"], "domain": "Data", "exports": ["MatchingTrace", "BankTransaction", "Product", "ProductMovement", "MatchingRule", "MatchingLog", "ReconciliationLine", "DailyIPVReport", "CashAdjustment", "IngestionError", "DailyAggregate", "MatchingCache", "IPVSettings", "IPVDatabase", "db"], "id": "src/lib/dexie.ts", "name": "dexie.ts", "technical_description": "Configuraci\u00f3n de persistencia local con Dexie.js (IndexedDB).", "user_description": "M\u00f3dulo del sistema para gestionar dexie.ts."}
